examples.title: Ball Bounce Height
examples.content: Independent: ball type. Dependent: bounce height. Control: drop height, surface, temperature.

examples.title: Water Freezing
examples.content: Independent: water type (tap, salt, sugar). Dependent: freezing time. Control: volume, starting temperature, container.

examples.title: Pendulum Swings
examples.content: Independent: bob mass. Dependent: period (swing time). Control: length, angle, location.
